metadata.description: Public Claude Code plugin marketplace for sharing useful development plugins and demonstrating best practices

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: A plugin for developer workflow automation including conventional commits and git operations

plugins.name: docs-kb
plugins.description: Progressive disclosure documentation system. Gives any project a docs/ directory that Claude navigates automatically based on task relevance.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 21 commands (/polish, /distill, /audit, /typeset, /overdrive, etc.) and an enhanced impeccable skill with curated anti-patterns.
